creator: tschweikle@gmail.com
text:
Loading one of the kernel modules

* /usr/local/lib/vmware-tools/modules/drivers/vmblock.ko
* /usr/local/lib/vmware-tools/modules/drivers/vmmemctl.ko
* /usr/local/lib/vmware-tools/modules/drivers/vmxnet.ko

leads to kernel panic on Kernels from svn-release r320354 on upward. Older kernels, build from releases before 
r320354, are working.

Seems related to changes within kernel leading modules to panic.
